meta.attribution: Visa requirement data adapted from the Wikipedia article 'Visa requirements for Australian citizens' (CC BY-SA 4.0). May lag official sources - always confirm with the destination's embassy or Smartraveller.
meta.modifications: Extracted from the source article's tables; raw requirement text normalised into six categories (free/voa/eta/evisa/required/none); destination names mapped to ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 codes; citation markers stripped; territory rows deduplicated against sovereign entries; notes truncated to 600 characters.
unmatchedNames: United Nations UN Buffer Zone in Cyprus
United Nations UNDOF Zone and Ghajar
United States United States Minor Outlying Islands

entries.name: Afghanistan
entries.notes: e-Visa : Visitors must arrive at Kabul International (KBL). Visa in advance for visitors to Afghanistan must be applied. Due to safety concerns, Australian government advises its citizens to not visit Afghanistan.

entries.name: Algeria
entries.notes: Application for a tourist visa to Algeria must be accompanied either by a certificate of accommodation. Persons may be denied entry if entering with a passport containing visas or stamps issued by Israel. Visitors on tours organized to some southern regions by an approved travel agency may obtain a visa on arrival for up to 30 days.

entries.name: Angola
entries.notes: 30 days per trip, but no more than 90 days within any 1 calendar year for tourism purposes only. Visitors must have a return/onward ticket and a hotel reservation confirmation. An International Certificate of Vaccination is required.

entries.name: Austria
entries.notes: 90 days per entry regardless of previous time spent in other Schengen countries

entries.name: Bangladesh
entries.notes: Not available at all entry points.

entries.name: Belarus
entries.notes: Must arrive and depart via Minsk International Airport , and not to / from Russia e-Visa can be issued for 30 days and can be used at all international checkpoints, including road and rail. Due to security concerns, as well as Belarus' support of the Russian invasion of Ukraine , the Australian government advises its citizens not to visit Belarus.

entries.name: Belgium
entries.notes: 90 days within any 180-day period in the Schengen Area . Additionally bilateral agreement permits 2 months on top of this.

entries.name: Benin
entries.notes: Must have an international vaccination certificate. Three types of electronic visa are offered: the e-Visa valid for 30 days for a single entry (50 EUR), the e-Visa valid for 30 days for several (multiple) entries (75 EUR), and the e-Visa valid for 90 days to make several (multiple) entries (100 EUR).

entries.name: Bhutan
entries.notes: The Sustainable Development Fee (SDF) of 200 USD per person, per night for almost all visitors to Bhutan. Additionally, if payment is made in US dollars from September 1, 2023 to August 31, 2027, the SDF is 100 USD.

entries.name: Bosnia and Herzegovina
entries.notes: 90 days within any 6-month period.

entries.name: Botswana
entries.notes: 90 days within any 1-year period.

entries.name: Brazil
entries.notes: Brazilian authorities have announced that Australian citizens will require a visa beginning 10 April 2025.

entries.name: Bulgaria
entries.notes: 90 days within any 180-day period in the Schengen Area .

entries.name: Burkina Faso
entries.notes: Due to security concerns, the Australian government advises its citizens not to visit Burkina Faso.

entries.name: Cambodia
entries.notes: Visa is also obtainable online.

entries.name: Cameroon
entries.notes: A tax for a visa on internal flights must be obtained upon arrival into Cameroon.

entries.name: Canada
entries.notes: eTA required if arriving by air. Also, an eTA not required when arriving by car, bus, train or boat (including a cruise ship).

entries.name: Cape Verde
entries.notes: Not available at all entry points.

entries.name: Central African Republic
entries.notes: A letter of invitation to the Central African Republic must be applied in advance for 2 weeks upon planned date of travel. Due to safety concerns, Australian government advises its citizens not to visit Central African Republic.

entries.name: Chad
entries.notes: Due to the significant risk of terrorism, kidnapping, crime and civil unrest, Australian government advises its citizens not to visit Chad.

entries.name: Chile
entries.notes: Since the 17th of September 2025, Australians no longer require a visa for stays of up to 90 days

entries.name: China
entries.notes: Visa-free from 1 July 2024 to 31 December 2026. 240-hour (10-day) visa-free transit to a third country or region (including Hong Kong , Macau or Taiwan ) using any mode of transport. Must have a confirmed onward ticket/itinerary, and enter through 1 of 64 approved ports . During which, may freely travel within the 24 provinces permitted for visa-free transit and engage in tourism, business, and visits. 24-hour visa-free transit to a third country or region (including Hong Kong, Macau, and Taiwan), is available at most international airports , without leaving the airport. Travellers who need to

entries.name: Colombia
entries.notes: 90 days - extendable up to 180 days stay within a 1-year period.

entries.name: Republic of the Congo
entries.notes: Visa and invitation letters approved via tour operators only.

entries.name: Democratic Republic of the Congo
entries.notes: Visa on arrival at Ndjili International Airport if a letter of invitation ( Visa volant ) issued by the Ministry of Interior and Security is conferred. Due to security concerns, the Australian government advises its citizens not to visit the Democratic Republic of Congo.

entries.name: Côte d'Ivoire
entries.notes: e-Visa holders must arrive via Port Bouet Airport .

entries.name: Croatia
entries.notes: 90 days within any 180-day period in the Schengen Area .

entries.name: Cuba
entries.notes: The Australian Government advises its citizens to 'exercise a high degree of caution in Cuba due to the threat of violent crime'.

entries.name: Cyprus
entries.notes: 90 days within any 180-day period.

entries.name: Czech Republic
entries.notes: 90 days within any 180-day period in the Schengen Area .

entries.name: Denmark
entries.notes: 90 days within any 180-day period. regardless of previous time spent in other Schengen countries (except the other Nordic countries)

entries.name: Egypt
entries.notes: Visa-on-arrival costs 30 USD for single entry visa (Tourism).

entries.name: Eritrea
entries.notes: A tourist visa for Australian citizens is issued for a stay of 1 month from arrival to Eritrea.

entries.name: Estonia
entries.notes: 90 days within any 180-day period in the Schengen Area .

entries.name: Ethiopia
entries.notes: Visa on arrival is obtainable only at Addis Ababa Bole International Airport . e-Visa holders must arrive via Addis Ababa Bole International Airport . e-Visa is available for 30 or 90 days.

entries.name: Finland
entries.notes: 90 days within any 180-day period regardless of previous time spent in other Schengen countries .

entries.name: France
entries.notes: 90 days within any 180-day period in metropolitan France , regardless of previous time spent in other Schengen countries .

entries.name: Gabon
entries.notes: e-Visa holders must arrive via Libreville International Airport .

entries.name: Germany
entries.notes: 90 days per entry regardless of previous time spent in other Schengen countries .

entries.name: Ghana
entries.notes: Visitors staying longer than 60 days are required to extend their visas at the Immigration Service .

entries.name: Greece
entries.notes: 90 days within any 180-day period in the Schengen Area .

entries.name: Haiti
entries.notes: Due to security concerns, the Australian government advises its citizens not to visit Haiti.

entries.name: Hungary
entries.notes: 90 days within any 180-day period in the Schengen Area .

entries.name: Iceland
entries.notes: 90 days within any 180-day period regardless of previous time spent in other Schengen countries .

entries.name: India
entries.notes: e-Visa holders must arrive via 32 designated airports or 5 designated seaports. An Indian e-Tourist Visa may only be obtained twice within 1 calendar year. Foreigners of Pakistani origin or who hold a Pakistani Passport are not eligible for an e-Visa. Foreigners who are not Pakistani nationals, but whose parents or grandparents (either paternal or maternal) were born in, or were permanent residents in Pakistan, are also not eligible for an e-Visa.

entries.name: Indonesia
entries.notes: Visa on arrival is extendable up to 60 days.

entries.name: Iran
entries.notes: Passengers who have already made an application, at least two days before arrival, at the Iranian Ministry of Foreign Affair's e-Visa website. and present the submission notification at the airport's visa desk may obtain a visa on arrival. Due to security concerns, the Australian government advises its citizens not to visit Iran.

entries.name: Iraq
entries.notes: Due to safety concerns, Australian government advises its citizens not to visit Iraq.

entries.name: Israel
entries.notes: Entry refused to anyone who "knowingly issues a public call for boycotting Israel."

entries.name: Italy
entries.notes: 90 days within any 180-day period regardless of previous time spent in other Schengen countries .

entries.name: Jordan
entries.notes: Visa can be obtained upon arrival, it will cost a total of 40 JOD, obtainable at most international ports of entry and land border crossings. (except King Hussein/Allenby Bridge )

entries.name: Kenya
entries.notes: Applications can be submitted up to 90 days prior to travel and must be submitted at least 3 days in advance. eTA fee is 32.50 USD . Proof of reservation at the hotel where visitors plan to stay is required (if staying with friends, an invitation letter is also acceptable). Yellow fever vaccination certificate is required if coming from endemic countries. Can also be entered on an East Africa tourist visa issued by Rwanda or Uganda.

entries.name: North Korea
entries.notes: Visitors traveling for tourist purposes must hold an authorization to travel, issued by a travel company in Korea (Dem. People's Rep.). Independent travelers must be accompanied by a tour guide at all times. Due to security concerns and the risk of arbitrary detention, the Australian government advises its citizens not to visit North Korea.

entries.name: South Korea
entries.notes: The validity period of a K-ETA is 3 years from the date of approval.

entries.name: Kyrgyzstan
entries.notes: 30 days within any 60-day period. A single or multiple tourist or business e-Visa for 90 days is also available.

entries.name: Laos
entries.notes: 18 of the 33 border crossings are only open to regular visa holders. e-Visa may be used to enter Laos through the Luang Prabang , Pakse and Vientiane international airports, 3 Thai-Lao Friendship Bridges , in Boten (road and railroad ), and in Vientiane (at Khamsavath railway station ). Visa on arrival is available at the Luang Prabang , Pakse and Vientiane international airports, 4 Thai-Lao Friendship Bridges and 7 border crossings.

entries.name: Latvia
entries.notes: 90 days within any 180-day period in the Schengen Area .

entries.name: Lebanon
entries.notes: Visa extendible for 2 additional months. Granted free of charge at Beirut International Airport or any other port of entry if there is no Israeli visa or seal, holding a telephone number, an address in Lebanon, and a non refundable return or circle trip ticket. Due to security concerns, the Australian government advises its citizens not to visit Lebanon.

entries.name: Liberia
entries.notes: Currently available only upon arrival at the Roberts International Airport (ROB) in Monrovia.

entries.name: Libya
entries.notes: Due to safety concerns, Australian government advises its citizens not to visit Libya.

entries.name: Liechtenstein
entries.notes: 90 days within any 180-day period in the Schengen Area .

entries.name: Lithuania
entries.notes: 90 days within any 180-day period in the Schengen Area .

entries.name: Luxembourg
entries.notes: 90 days within any 180-day period regardless of previous time spent in other Schengen countries .

entries.name: Madagascar
entries.notes: For stays of 61 to 90 days, the visa fee is 59 USD.

entries.name: Mali
entries.notes: An average processing time for a tourist visa to Mali upon 3-15 working days is mandatory. Due to security concerns, the Australian government advises its citizens not to visit Mali.

entries.name: Malta
entries.notes: 90 days within any 180-day period in the Schengen Area .

entries.name: Mauritania
entries.notes: Available at Nouakchott–Oumtounsy International Airport .

entries.name: Moldova
entries.notes: 90 days within any 180-day period.

entries.name: Mongolia
entries.notes: The Ministry of Foreign Affairs of Mongolia has exempted visas for 34 countries from January 2023 to December 2026.

entries.name: Montenegro
entries.notes: 90 days within any 180-day period.

entries.name: Mozambique
entries.notes: Travelers must pay a fee of 190 USD upon entry.

entries.name: Myanmar
entries.notes: Due to ongoing civil unrest and armed conflict, Australian government advises its citizens not to visit Myanmar.

entries.name: Nauru
entries.notes: Criminal record and medical fitness certificates are not required for Australian citizens. Australian citizens are given 7 days to pay a fee AU$ 50 per day in procedure for an application of a new visa to Nauru.

entries.name: Netherlands
entries.notes: 90 days within any 180-day period regardless of previous time spent in other Schengen countries ( European Netherlands ).

entries.name: New Zealand
entries.notes: Australian citizens traveling on an Australian passport may be granted a New Zealand Resident Visa on arrival entitling the holder to live, work and study indefinitely (pursuant to the Trans-Tasman Travel Arrangement ), subject to meeting character requirements. May enter using eGate . Electronic Travel Authority not required. International Visitor Conservation and Tourism Levy not required.

entries.name: Niger
entries.notes: Visa on arrival at Diori Hamani International Airport if a letter of invitation ( Visa Volant ) issued by the Ministry of Interior is conferred. Due to the political instability, the Australian government advises its citizens not to visit Niger.

entries.name: North Macedonia
entries.notes: 90 days within any 180-day period.

entries.name: Norway
entries.notes: 90 days within any 180-day period regardless of previous time spent in other Schengen countries (except other Nordic countries).

entries.name: Poland
entries.notes: 90 days within any 180-day period in the Schengen Area .

entries.name: Portugal
entries.notes: 90 days within any 180-day period in the Schengen Area .

entries.name: Romania
entries.notes: 90 days within any 180-day period in the Schengen Area .

entries.name: Russia
entries.notes: Process in tourist visas for stays with a period of 30 days is acquired. Due to security concerns, the Russian invasion of Ukraine , and arbitrary detentions, the Australian government advises its citizens not to visit Russia.

entries.name: Rwanda
entries.notes: Can also be entered on an East Africa Tourist Visa issued by Kenya or Uganda.

entries.name: Saudi Arabia
entries.notes: Non-Muslim residents are prohibited from visiting Mecca and its holy sites. Other religious places may also be restricted to Non-Muslim people.

entries.name: Serbia
entries.notes: 90 days within any 180-day period.

entries.name: Seychelles
entries.notes: Application can be submitted up to 30 days before travel. Visitors must upload a reservation confirmation(s) for each visitor's location of stay in Seychelles. Yellow fever vaccination certificate is required if coming from endemic countries. Payment of the fee (EUR 10) by credit or debit card. Valid for one journey only and it expires once exit the country.

entries.name: Slovakia
entries.notes: 90 days within any 180-day period in the Schengen Area .

entries.name: Slovenia
entries.notes: 90 days within any 180-day period in the Schengen Area .

entries.name: Somalia
entries.notes: Due to safety concerns, Australian government advises its citizens not to visit Somalia.

entries.name: South Sudan
entries.notes: Obtainable online 30 days single entry for 100 USD, 90 days multiple entry for 200 USD and 180 days multiple entry for 350 USD. Printed visa authorization must be presented at the time of travel. Due to security concerns, the Australian government advises its citizens not to visit South Sudan.

entries.name: Spain
entries.notes: 90 days within any 180-day period regardless of previous time spent in other Schengen countries .

entries.name: Sudan
entries.notes: Visa on arrival if holding letter of invitation registered in the Sudan with a pre-approval from the Foreign Affairs . Registration for a visa is obligatory within 3 days of arrival. It can be completed at entry ports. Visa not required for Sudanese-born citizens. Due to security concerns, the Australian government advises its citizens not to visit Sudan.

entries.name: Suriname
entries.notes: An entrance fee of USD 50 or EUR 50 must be paid online prior to arrival. Multiple entry e-Visa is also available.

entries.name: Sweden
entries.notes: 90 days within any 180-day period regardless of previous time spent in other Schengen countries . (except other Nordic countries)

entries.name: Switzerland
entries.notes: 90 days within any 180-day period in the Schengen Area .

entries.name: Syria
entries.notes: Due to safety concerns, Australian government advises its citizens not to visit Syria.

entries.name: Tajikistan
entries.notes: e-Visa also available. e-Visa holders can enter through all border points.

entries.name: Thailand
entries.notes: Maximum two visits annually if not arriving by air.

entries.name: Timor-Leste
entries.notes: Not available at all entry points.

entries.name: Turkmenistan
entries.notes: 10-day visa on arrival if holding a letter of invitation provided by a company registered in Turkmenistan with a prior approval from the Foreign Ministry . Visitors can apply to extend their stay for an additional 10 days. When transiting between two non-bordering countries, visitors can obtain a Turkmenistan transit visa for a five-day stay. This must be applied for in advance at the Turkmenistan Embassy. Visitors must also submit copies of the visas for the country of entry into Turkmenistan and the country of departure from Turkmenistan. Visa fee is 20 USD.

entries.name: Uganda
entries.notes: Can also be entered on an East Africa Tourist Visa issued by Kenya or Rwanda.

entries.name: Ukraine
entries.notes: 90 days within any 180-day period. Due to the ongoing Russian invasion of Ukraine , the Australian government advises its citizens not to visit Ukraine.

entries.name: United Arab Emirates
entries.notes: May apply using 'Smart Service'.

entries.name: United Kingdom and Crown dependencies
entries.notes: Visa also not required if holder has UK ancestry clearance visa. ETA UK is valid for 2 years. Adults can use ePassport gates.

entries.name: United States
entries.notes: ESTA is valid for 2 years from the date of issuance. ESTA is also required when entering the country by cruise ship or land. A Form I-94 is required for entry into the United States by land. It carries a $30 fee and can be obtained either online or upon arrival. Visa required for nationals of VWP countries who have travelled or been present in Iran, Iraq, Libya, North Korea, Somalia, Sudan, Syria or Yemen at any time on or after 1 March 2011 or Cuba at any time on or after 12 January 2021, or nationals of VWP countries who are also nationals of Iran, Iraq, North Korea, Sudan or Syria. Exceptio

entries.name: Venezuela
entries.notes: Due to safety concerns, Australian government advises its citizens not to visit Venezuela.

entries.name: Vietnam
entries.notes: 30 days Visa free when visit Phu Quoc Island . e-Visa is valid for 90 days and multiple entry.

entries.name: Yemen
entries.notes: Due to safety concerns, Australian government advises its citizens not to visit Yemen. Yemen introduced an e-Visa system for visitors who meet certain eligibility requirements (group travel of 10 or more people, business trips, and transit etc.).

entries.name: Zambia
entries.notes: Also eligible for a universal visa allowing access to Zimbabwe.

entries.name: Zimbabwe
entries.notes: Strictly tourism purposes only. Also eligible for a universal visa allowing access to Zambia. e-Visa available.

entries.name: Kosovo
entries.notes: 90 days

entries.name: Palestine
entries.notes: Arrival by sea to Gaza Strip not allowed.

entries.name: Taiwan
entries.notes: 90 days; May enter using eGate .

entries.name: Hong Kong
entries.notes: 90 days

entries.name: Macau
entries.notes: 30 days

entries.name: French Polynesia
entries.notes: 90 days within 180 days

entries.name: New Caledonia
entries.notes: 3 months

entries.name: Saint Pierre and Miquelon
entries.notes: 3 months

entries.name: Wallis and Futuna
entries.notes: 3 months

entries.name: Aruba
entries.notes: 30 days, extendable to 180 days

entries.name: Curaçao
entries.notes: 90 days

entries.name: Sint Maarten
entries.notes: 90 days

entries.name: Cook Islands
entries.notes: 31 days

entries.name: Niue
entries.notes: 30 days

entries.name: Anguilla
entries.notes: 3 months

entries.name: Bermuda
entries.notes: Up to 6 months, decided on arrival.

entries.name: British Indian Ocean Territory
entries.notes: Special permit required.

entries.name: British Virgin Islands
entries.notes: 30 days, extensions possible

entries.name: Cayman Islands
entries.notes: 6 months

entries.name: Falkland Islands
entries.notes: A visitor permit is normally issued as a stamp in the passport on arrival, The maximum validity period is 1 month.

entries.name: Montserrat
entries.notes: 6 months

entries.name: Pitcairn Islands
entries.notes: 14 days visa free and landing fee 35 USD or tax of 5 USD if not going ashore.

entries.name: South Georgia and the South Sandwich Islands
entries.notes: Pre-arrival permit from the Commissioner required (72 hours/1 month for 110/160 pounds sterling ).

entries.name: Turks and Caicos Islands
entries.notes: 90 days

entries.name: American Samoa
entries.notes: 30 days

entries.name: Guam
entries.notes: 45 days

entries.name: Northern Mariana Islands
entries.notes: 45 days

entries.name: Puerto Rico
entries.notes: Visa not required under the Visa Waiver Program , for 90 days on arrival from overseas for 2 years. ESTA required.
